requirements: resolve derives the authenticated caller, Binding, target FacetRef, protection domain, Grant lineage, denies, path epochs, and resolution lifetime from owned state
callers never supply Grants, team closure, guest verification, epochs, watermarks, lease, impact, placement, trust, or a FacetRef
tier is synchronous over a host-issued resolution and can only tighten to mediated
authorizeDirect synchronously checks exact current Turn lease, bundled placement, immutable deadline, delivered watermark, active Binding resolution, and complete input constraints
authorizeMediated returns opaque current authority evidence for the complete ordered input list
allowsInterception requires same-domain placement, target interceptable opt-in, and contributor authority
release invalidates and disposes provider or dynamic resolution resources
